changelog:
### Iconify v7.3.0 has arrived! It has the following new changes:
## Feature Changes:
- __New Additions:__
    - Added new lockscreen clock styles.
    - Added a few missing icons in icon packs.
- __General Improvements:__
    - Status bar logo customization improvements.
    - Heads-Up & media blur effects, and OneUI 7 battery style.
    - Multiple bug fixes, stability improvements, and translation updates.
## App Changes:
- Bump AGP and dependencies
- Updated translations (thanks to all the contributors on [Crowdin](https://crowdin.com/project/iconify))
- And many more improvements...
Also included in this version are bug fixes and other improvements.
